title: BTC Momentum Strategy Backtest
description: MA20/MA200 crossover strategy on BTC/USDT with 10% trailing stop. Produces +58.09% return with Sharpe 1.06 vs buy-and-hold +13.70% over 2+ years of daily data from Binance.

title: BTC-Gold Correlation Across Market Regimes
description: Empirical analysis of BTC-PAXG correlation across four distinct market regimes: pre-ATH bull run, post-ATH drawdown, Iran war period, and post-ceasefire. Uses Binance daily data with 20-day rolling correlation.

title: BTC CVD Divergence Filter Backtest
description: MA20/MA200 crossover momentum strategy with vs without CVD (Cumulative Volume Delta) divergence filter. Tests whether order-flow data improves signal quality and reduces false entries.

title: Gold Momentum Strategy Backtest
description: MA20/MA200 momentum backtest on Gold Futures (GC=F). Reveals 0 trades in 2.2 years — a finding that demonstrates why sustained bull trends break momentum signals and reinforces the importance of asset-specific strategy design.
